mapper.insert: insert into dish (name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUE (#{name},#{categoryId},#{price},#{image},#{description},#{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update dish name=#{name}, category_id=#{categoryId}, price=#{price}, image=#{image}, description=#{description}, status=#{status}, update_time=#{updateTime}, update_user=#{updateUser},
where id=#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from dish where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select NAME, CATEGORY_ID, PRICE, IMAGE, DESCRIPTION, STATUS, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_USER from dish WHERE id IN
#{id}
